home.layout.description.message: Signal traces how intent travels — from first impression to final action. Not just what was clicked. Why it was clicked.
home.layout.description.description: Front page layout description (meta description for SEO)

home.head.title.message: Signal - Every Click Tells a Story

home.hero.eyebrow.description: Front page hero eyebrow above the heading

home.hero.heading.message: Every click tells a story. Most tools miss the plot.

home.hero.tagline.message: Signal traces how intent travels — from first impression to final action. Not just what was clicked. Why it was clicked. And what almost was.
home.hero.tagline.description: Front page hero tagline beneath the heading

home.hero.ctaLabel.description: Front page hero primary call-to-action button label

home.hero.secondaryCtaLabel.description: Front page hero secondary call-to-action button label

home.features.beacon.title.description: Front page Features card title for Beacon

home.features.beacon.description.message: Link minting engine. Branded short links with embedded attribution metadata that survives URL shortening, messaging apps, and cross-device handoffs. Every link is a sensor.
home.features.beacon.description.description: Front page Features card description for Beacon

home.features.prism.title.description: Front page Features card title for Prism

home.features.prism.description.message: Multi-touch attribution modeler. Traces conversion paths across channels, assigns weighted credit to every touchpoint, and reconstructs the full journey from first encounter to final action.
home.features.prism.description.description: Front page Features card description for Prism

home.features.pulse.title.description: Front page Features card title for Pulse

home.features.pulse.description.message: Real-time click stream. A live feed of every interaction — geo, device, referrer, and attribution data — arriving within one second of each click.
home.features.pulse.description.description: Front page Features card description for Pulse

home.features.aperture.title.description: Front page Features card title for Aperture

home.features.aperture.description.message: Campaign snapshots. Point-in-time performance captures with comparison overlays. See exactly what changed between any two moments in a campaign.
home.features.aperture.description.description: Front page Features card description for Aperture

home.features.resonance.title.description: Front page Features card title for Resonance

home.features.resonance.description.message: Audience overlap detector. Finds where audiences bleed into each other across campaigns and segments. Stop paying twice to reach the same people.
home.features.resonance.description.description: Front page Features card description for Resonance

home.features.flare.title.description: Front page Features card title for Flare

home.features.flare.description.message: QR and deep link generator. Bridges physical and digital attribution with full trace metadata. Every scan carries the same intelligence as a digital click.
home.features.flare.description.description: Front page Features card description for Flare

home.stats.latency.label.description: Front page Stats label for redirect latency

home.stats.links.label.description: Front page Stats label for links traced

home.stats.uptime.label.description: Front page Stats label for uptime

home.stats.regions.label.description: Front page Stats label for regions

home.spotlight.description.message: Every link is a sensor. Every redirect is a data point. Prism connects them into a single attribution path.
home.spotlight.description.description: Front page Spotlight description paragraph below the code snippet

home.blogPreview.description.message: Case studies, technical deep dives, and the patterns hiding in your click streams.

showcase.spotlightCode.description.message: Three commands to go from zero to a fully attributed link.

showcase.item.spotlightText.title.description: Showcase item title for Spotlight (with text variant)

showcase.spotlightText.description.message: Signal embeds attribution metadata in the link itself — not in query parameters that get stripped, not in referrer headers that disappear. When a click happens, Pulse captures it. When a conversion happens, Prism reconstructs the full path. No tracking pixels. No page-side scripts.

showcase.item.blogPreviewWithDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (with description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.description.message: Case studies, campaign forensics, and the patterns hiding in your click streams.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.title.message: We Traced a Viral Campaign to a Single Link in a Tuesday Newsletter

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.descr.message: A 40% conversion spike traced to a sidebar link nobody flagged as important.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.title.message: Dark Traffic: The Clicks You Cannot See

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.descr.message: When someone copies a URL into a messaging app, the referrer disappears. Beacon metadata survives.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.descr.message: Crediting the final touchpoint is a lie. Prism distributes credit across the full path.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.description.message: If something brought you here, the link is probably out of date.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 4 of 5 — CTA label (vacant-address voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.title.message: We could not find what you were looking for.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.description.message: Double-check the URL for typos, or head back to start fresh.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 5 of 5 — CTA label (apologetic voice)

theme.blog.authorsList.pageTitle.description: The title of the authors page

theme.docs.sidebar.expandButtonAriaLabel.description: The ARIA label for the button that expands the doc sidebar

theme.docs.sidebar.collapseButtonAriaLab.description: The ARIA label for the button that collapses the doc sidebar

theme.blog.post.plurals.description: Pluralized label for "{count} posts". Use as much plural forms (separated by "|") as your language support (see https://www.unicode.org/cldr/cldr-aux/charts/34/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html)

theme.blog.tagTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog tag

theme.blog.author.pageTitle.description: The title of the page for a blog author

theme.blog.authorsList.viewAll.description: The label of the link targeting the blog authors page

theme.blog.author.noPosts.message: This author has not written any posts yet.
theme.blog.author.noPosts.description: The text for authors with 0 blog post

theme.common.skipToMainContent.description: The skip to content label used for accessibility, allowing to rapidly navigate to main content with keyboard tab/enter navigation

theme.tags.tagsPageTitle.description: The title of the tag list page

theme.footer.copyright.description: Footer copyright text. The {copyright} placeholder receives the consumer's themeConfig.footer.copyright value as the source-locale fallback; per-locale overrides in i18n code.json usually inline their own text.
